contenders.handicapper_notes: Samuel Marin aboard. Earning a strong 98 speed rating. Ran a solid 3rd last out at Presque Isle Downs on tapeta. Prior turf form was weak, but her dirt/synthetic pedigree suggests she will handle this surface well.
Luis Fuenmayor aboard. Earning a 91 speed rating. Has not run since August 2025, but her debut effort at Colonial was highly competitive. Training well for her return.
Taylor Kingsley takes the mount. Earning a 99 speed rating. Disappointed on a muddy track last out, but her debut at Colonial last year was decent. Significant class drop to $12.5k MCL.
Sonny Leon takes over. Earning an 88 speed rating. Dropping from turf MCL 16k. Her dirt form at Laurel includes a competitive 3rd-place finish in a 12.5k MCL.
Daniel Centeno aboard. Earning a 95 speed rating. Showed improvement when 2nd in a $10k MCL at Tampa two back. Competitive in this class.
First-time starter by Engage out of Fighting Pickle. Workouts at GDF are slow. Hard to endorse on debut.
First-time starter by No Never No More. Workouts at Colonial are slow. Hard to recommend.
Carlos Montalvo takes over. Two abysmal starts at Charles Town in low-level MCLs, beaten double-digit lengths.
